title: helictochloa praeusta
intro: Helictochloa praeusta, also known as Rough Brome, is a type of perennial grass native to Europe and Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and as an anti-inflammatory agent. Its health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and potentially alleviating symptoms of colds and flu. The herbal preparations of Helictochloa praeusta typically involve drying the plant's leaves and roots, which can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
